                      • ※ 名词解释

                      # c-capm

                      标 ※ 的是考题，没有标的希望之后你们好好看看。

                      # ※ Example 1 风险溢价之谜

                      下面仅考查居民端的行为，经济中存在两种资产，一种是无风险资产 AtfA_t^fAtf​，其利率 RtfR_t^fRtf​ 为确定值；另一种是风险资产 AtA_tAt​，其利率为 RtR_tRt​，{Rt}\{R_t\}{Rt​} 是一个随机过程。居民的劳动收入为 WtNtW_tN_tWt​Nt​，居民效用形式如下：

                      Et∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k){\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} \beta^k u(C_{t+k}) Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct+k​)

                      居民面临的预算约束如下：

                      Ct+k+At+k+1+At+k+1f=Rt+kfAt+kf+Rt+kAt+k+Wt+kNt+k+TtC_{t+k}+A_{t+k+1}+A_{t+k+1}^f = R_{t+k}^fA_{t+k}^f+R_{t+k}A_{t+k}+ W_{t+k}N_{t+k}+ T_t Ct+k​+At+k+1​+At+k+1f​=Rt+kf​At+kf​+Rt+k​At+k​+Wt+k​Nt+k​+Tt​

                      求解以下问题：

                      （1） 写出居民的值函数问题。

                      解：

                      V(At,Atf)=△max⁡Ct+k,At+k+1,At+k+1fEt∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k)s.t.Ct+k+At+k+1+At+k+1f=Rt+kfAt+kf+Rt+kAt+k+Wt+kNt+k+Tt\begin{align*} V(A_t,A_t^f)\stackrel{\triangle}{=} \max_{C_{t+k},A_{t+k+1},A_{t+k+1}^f}\quad & {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty}\beta^k u(C_{t+k})\\ & \text{s.t.} \quad C_{t+k}+A_{t+k+1}+A_{t+k+1}^f = R_{t+k}^f A_{t+k}^f + R_{t+k}A_{t+k}+ W_{t+k}N_{t+k}+T_t\\ \end{align*}V(At​,Atf​)=△Ct+k​,At+k+1​,At+k+1f​max​​Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct+k​)s.t.Ct+k​+At+k+1​+At+k+1f​=Rt+kf​At+kf​+Rt+k​At+k​+Wt+k​Nt+k​+Tt​​

                      V(At,Atf)=max⁡Ct,At+1,At+1fu(Ct)+βEtV(At+1,At+1f)s.t.Ct+At+1+At+1f=RtfAtf+RtAt+WtNt+Tt\begin{align*} V(A_t,A_t^f){=} \max_{C_{t},A_{t+1},A_{t+1}^f}\quad & u(C_t)+\beta{\mathbb E}_t V(A_{t+1},A_{t+1}^f)\\ & \text{s.t.} \quad C_{t}+A_{t+1}+A_{t+1}^f = R_{t}^f A_{t}^f + R_{t}A_{t}+ W_{t}N_{t}+T_t\\ \end{align*}V(At​,Atf​)=Ct​,At+1​,At+1f​max​​u(Ct​)+βEt​V(At+1​,At+1f​)s.t.Ct​+At+1​+At+1f​=Rtf​Atf​+Rt​At​+Wt​Nt​+Tt​​

                      V(At,Atf)=max⁡Ct,At+1,At+1fu(Ct)+βEtV(At+1,At+1f)−λt(Ct+At+1+At+1f−RtfAtf−RtAt−WtNt−Tt)\begin{align*}V(A_t,A_t^f){=} \max_{C_{t},A_{t+1},A_{t+1}^f} & u(C_t)+\beta{\mathbb E}_t V(A_{t+1},A_{t+1}^f)\\& -\lambda_t(C_{t}+A_{t+1}+A_{t+1}^f - R_{t}^f A_{t}^f - R_{t}A_{t}- W_{t}N_{t}-T_t)\end{align*} V(At​,Atf​)=Ct​,At+1​,At+1f​max​​u(Ct​)+βEt​V(At+1​,At+1f​)−λt​(Ct​+At+1​+At+1f​−Rtf​Atf​−Rt​At​−Wt​Nt​−Tt​)​

                      （2） 求解居民的 Euler 方程。

                      解：

                      对 CtC_tCt​ 求导

                      u′(Ct)−λt=0(1)u'(C_t)-\lambda_t=0\tag{1} u′(Ct​)−λt​=0(1)

                      对 At+1A_{t+1}At+1​ 求导

                      βEt∂V∂A(At+1,At+1f)=λt(2)\beta{\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial V}{\partial A}(A_{t+1},{A_{t+1}^f})=\lambda_t\tag{2} βEt​∂A∂V​(At+1​,At+1f​)=λt​(2)

                      对 At+1fA_{t+1}^fAt+1f​ 求导

                      βEt∂V∂Af(At+1,At+1f)=λt(3)\beta{\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial V}{\partial A^f}(A_{t+1},{A_{t+1}^f})=\lambda_t\tag{3} βEt​∂Af∂V​(At+1​,At+1f​)=λt​(3)

                      对 AtA_tAt​ 使用包络定理

                      ∂V∂A(At,Atf)=λtRt(4)\frac{\partial V}{\partial A}(A_t,A_t^f)=\lambda_tR_t\tag{4} ∂A∂V​(At​,Atf​)=λt​Rt​(4)

                      对 AtfA_t^fAtf​ 使用包络定理

                      ∂V∂Af(At,Atf)=λtRtf(5)\frac{\partial V}{\partial A^f}(A_t,A_t^f)=\lambda_tR_t^f\tag{5} ∂Af∂V​(At​,Atf​)=λt​Rtf​(5)

                      (i) 对 (4) 延后一期得

                      ∂V∂A(At+1,At+1f)=λt+1Rt+1=u′(Ct+1)Rt+1\frac{\partial V}{\partial A}(A_{t+1},A_{t+1}^f)=\lambda_{t+1}R_{t+1}=u'(C_{t+1})R_{t+1} ∂A∂V​(At+1​,At+1f​)=λt+1​Rt+1​=u′(Ct+1​)Rt+1​

                      代入 (2) 式可得

                      βEtu′(Ct+1)Rt+1=λt=u′(Ct)\beta {\mathbb E}_t u'(C_{t+1})R_{t+1}=\lambda_t = u'(C_t) βEt​u′(Ct+1​)Rt+1​=λt​=u′(Ct​)

                      Etβu′(Ct+1)u′(Ct)Rt+1=1{\mathbb E}_t \beta\frac {u'(C_{t+1})}{u'(C_t)}R_{t+1}=1 Et​βu′(Ct​)u′(Ct+1​)​Rt+1​=1

                      (ii) 对 (5) 延后一期得

                      ∂V∂Af(At+1,At+1f)=λt+1Rt+1f=u′(Ct+1)Rt+1f\frac{\partial V}{\partial A^f}(A_{t+1},A_{t+1}^f)=\lambda_{t+1}R_{t+1}^f=u'(C_{t+1})R_{t+1}^f ∂Af∂V​(At+1​,At+1f​)=λt+1​Rt+1f​=u′(Ct+1​)Rt+1f​

                      代入 (3) 式可得

                      βEtu′(Ct+1)Rt+1f=λt=u′(Ct)\beta {\mathbb E}_t u'(C_{t+1})R_{t+1}^f=\lambda_t = u'(C_t) βEt​u′(Ct+1​)Rt+1f​=λt​=u′(Ct​)

                      Etβu′(Ct+1)u′(Ct)Rt+1f=1{\mathbb E}_t \beta\frac {u'(C_{t+1})}{u'(C_t)}R_{t+1}^f=1 Et​βu′(Ct​)u′(Ct+1​)​Rt+1f​=1

                      {Etβu′(Ct+1)u′(Ct)Rt+1=1Etβu′(Ct+1)u′(Ct)Rt+1f=1(6)\begin{cases}{\mathbb E}_t \beta\frac {u'(C_{t+1})}{u'(C_t)}R_{t+1}=1\\ {\mathbb E}_t \beta\frac {u'(C_{t+1})}{u'(C_t)}R_{t+1}^f=1\end{cases}\tag{6}{Et​βu′(Ct​)u′(Ct+1​)​Rt+1​=1Et​βu′(Ct​)u′(Ct+1​)​Rt+1f​=1​(6)

                      （3） 令 Rt+1e=Rt+1−Rt+1fR_{t+1}^e = R_{t+1}-R_{t+1}^fRt+1e​=Rt+1​−Rt+1f​ 为风险超额收益，令 Mt,t+1=βu′(Ct+1)u′(Ct)M_{t,t+1} = \beta \frac{u'(C_{t+1})}{u'(C_t)}Mt,t+1​=βu′(Ct​)u′(Ct+1​)​，求关于 Et(Rt+1e){\mathbb E}_t (R_{t+1}^e)Et​(Rt+1e​) 的表示。

                      解：

                      由 (6) 两式相减可得

                      EtMt,t+1Rt+1e=0{\mathbb E}_t M_{t,t+1} R_{t+1}^e =0 Et​Mt,t+1​Rt+1e​=0

                      因为

                      Cov(X,Y)=E[XY]−E[X]E[Y]\text{Cov}(X,Y)=E[XY]-E[X]E[Y] Cov(X,Y)=E[XY]−E[X]E[Y]

                      令 X=Mt,t+1,Y=Rt+1eX=M_{t,t+1},Y=R_{t+1}^eX=Mt,t+1​,Y=Rt+1e​ 可得

                      Covt(Mt,t+1,Rt+1e)=Et[Mt,t+1Rt+1e]−Et[Mt,t+1]Et[Rt+1e]\text{Cov}_t(M_{t,t+1},R_{t+1}^e)={\mathbb E}_t[M_{t,t+1}R_{t+1}^e]-{\mathbb E}_t[M_{t,t+1}]{\mathbb E}_t[R_{t+1}^e] Covt​(Mt,t+1​,Rt+1e​)=Et​[Mt,t+1​Rt+1e​]−Et​[Mt,t+1​]Et​[Rt+1e​]

                      Et[Rt+1e]=−Covt(Mt,t+1,Rt+1e)Et[Mt,t+1](7){\mathbb E}_t[R_{t+1}^e]=-\frac{\text{Cov}_t(M_{t,t+1},R_{t+1}^e)}{{\mathbb E}_t[M_{t,t+1}]}\tag{7} Et​[Rt+1e​]=−Et​[Mt,t+1​]Covt​(Mt,t+1​,Rt+1e​)​(7)

                      （4） 令 c^t=Ct+1−CtCt\hat c_t=\frac{C_{t+1}-C_{t}}{C_t}c^t​=Ct​Ct+1​−Ct​​，若 Covt[u′(Ct+1),Rt+1e]=Covt(c^t+1,Rt+1e)×Etu′′(Ct+1)Ct+1\text{Cov}_t\left[u'(C_{t+1}) , R_{t+1}^e\right] =\text{Cov}_t(\hat c_{t+1},R_{t+1}^e)\times {\mathbb E}_t u''(C_{t+1})C_{t+1}Covt​[u′(Ct+1​),Rt+1e​]=Covt​(c^t+1​,Rt+1e​)×Et​u′′(Ct+1​)Ct+1​，且 u(C)=C1−σ−11−σu(C)= \frac{C^{1-\sigma}-1}{1-\sigma}u(C)=1−σC1−σ−1​。求 Et[Rt+1e]{\mathbb E}_t[R_{t+1}^e]Et​[Rt+1e​] 与 Cov(c^t+1,Rt+1e)\text{Cov}(\hat c_{t+1},R_{t+1}^e)Cov(c^t+1​,Rt+1e​) 的关系。

                      解：

                      Covt(Mt,t+1,Rt+1e)=Covt[βu′(Ct+1)u′(Ct),Rt+1e]\text{Cov}_t(M_{t,t+1},R_{t+1}^e) =\text{Cov}_t\left[\beta\frac{u'(C_{t+1})}{u'(C_{t})},R_{t+1}^e\right] Covt​(Mt,t+1​,Rt+1e​)=Covt​[βu′(Ct​)u′(Ct+1​)​,Rt+1e​]

                      在时刻 ttt u′(Ct)u'(C_t)u′(Ct​) 与 β\betaβ 为常数，所以

                      Covt(Mt,t+1,Rt+1e)=βu′(Ct)Covt[u′(Ct+1),Rt+1e]\text{Cov}_t(M_{t,t+1},R_{t+1}^e) =\frac\beta{u'(C_t)} \text{Cov}_t\left[{u'(C_{t+1})},R_{t+1}^e\right] Covt​(Mt,t+1​,Rt+1e​)=u′(Ct​)β​Covt​[u′(Ct+1​),Rt+1e​]

                      代入 Covt[u′(Ct+1),Rt+1e]=Covt(c^t+1,Rt+1e)×Etu′′(Ct+1)Ct+1\text{Cov}_t\left[u'(C_{t+1}) , R_{t+1}^e\right] =\text{Cov}_t(\hat c_{t+1},R_{t+1}^e)\times {\mathbb E}_t u''(C_{t+1})C_{t+1}Covt​[u′(Ct+1​),Rt+1e​]=Covt​(c^t+1​,Rt+1e​)×Et​u′′(Ct+1​)Ct+1​ 可得

                      Covt(Mt,t+1,Rt+1e)=Covt(c^t+1,Rt+1e)×Etβu′′(Ct+1)Ct+1u′(Ct)\text{Cov}_t(M_{t,t+1},R_{t+1}^e) = \text{Cov}_t(\hat c_{t+1},R_{t+1}^e)\times {\mathbb E}_t \frac{\beta u ''(C_{t+1})C_{t+1}}{u'(C_t)} Covt​(Mt,t+1​,Rt+1e​)=Covt​(c^t+1​,Rt+1e​)×Et​u′(Ct​)βu′′(Ct+1​)Ct+1​​

                      代入 (7) 可得

                      EtRt+1e=−Covt(c^t+1,Rt+1e)×Etβu′′(Ct+1)Ct+1u′(Ct)Etβu′(Ct+1)/u′(Ct)=−Etu′′(Ct+1)Ct+1Etu′(Ct+1)Covt(c^t+1,Rt+1e)\begin{align*}{\mathbb E}_t R_{t+1}^e & = - \frac{\text{Cov}_t(\hat c_{t+1},R_{t+1}^e)\times {\mathbb E}_t \frac{\beta u ''(C_{t+1})C_{t+1}}{u'(C_t)}}{{\mathbb E}_t\beta u'(C_{t+1})/u'(C_t)}\\ & = -\frac{{\mathbb E}_tu ''(C_{t+1})C_{t+1}\;}{{\mathbb E}_tu'(C_{t+1})}\text{Cov}_t(\hat c_{t+1},R_{t+1}^e)\end{align*}Et​Rt+1e​​=−Et​βu′(Ct+1​)/u′(Ct​)Covt​(c^t+1​,Rt+1e​)×Et​u′(Ct​)βu′′(Ct+1​)Ct+1​​​=−Et​u′(Ct+1​)Et​u′′(Ct+1​)Ct+1​​Covt​(c^t+1​,Rt+1e​)​

                      因为 u(C)=C1−σ/(1−σ)u(C) = C^{1-\sigma}/(1-\sigma)u(C)=C1−σ/(1−σ)，可得 u′(C)=C−σ,u′′(C)=−σC−σ−1u'(C)= C^{-\sigma},u''(C)= -\sigma C^{-\sigma-1}u′(C)=C−σ,u′′(C)=−σC−σ−1，可得

                      EtRt+1e=σCovt(c^t+1,Rt+1e){\mathbb E}_t R_{t+1}^e = \sigma \text{Cov}_t(\hat c_{t+1},R_{t+1}^e) Et​Rt+1e​=σCovt​(c^t+1​,Rt+1e​)

                      （5） 若 Cov(c^t+1,Rt+1e)>0\text{Cov} (\hat c_{t+1},R_{t+1}^e) > 0Cov(c^t+1​,Rt+1e​)>0，且 Var(c^t+1)=0.9%\text{Var}(\hat c_{t+1}) = 0.9\%Var(c^t+1​)=0.9%，Var(Rt+1e)=0.1%\text{Var} (R_{t+1}^e) = 0.1\%Var(Rt+1e​)=0.1%，而 EtRt+1e=6%{\mathbb E}_t R_{t+1}^e = 6\%Et​Rt+1e​=6%。问 σ\sigmaσ 至少要多大？

                      解：

                      ∣Cov(c^t+1,Rt+1e)∣≤Var(c^t+1)Var(Rt+1e)=0.3%|\text{Cov} (\hat c_{t+1},R_{t+1}^e)|\leq \sqrt{\text{Var}(\hat c_{t+1})\text{Var}(R_{t+1}^e)} = 0.3\% ∣Cov(c^t+1​,Rt+1e​)∣≤Var(c^t+1​)Var(Rt+1e​)​=0.3%

                      0<Cov(c^t+1,Rt+1e)<0.3%0 < \text{Cov} (\hat c_{t+1},R_{t+1}^e)< 0.3\% 0<Cov(c^t+1​,Rt+1e​)<0.3%

                      σ=EtRt+1eCov(Rt+1,c^t+1)>6%0.3%=20\sigma = \frac{{\mathbb E}_t R_{t+1}^e } {\text{Cov}(R_{t+1},\hat c_{t+1})}> \frac{6\%}{0.3\%} = 20 σ=Cov(Rt+1​,c^t+1​)Et​Rt+1e​​>0.3%6%​=20

                      至少要20

                      （6） 从微观实证获得， σ≤10\sigma\leq 10σ≤10，结合第五问说明何为风险溢价之谜。

                      解： 微观获得的跨期替代弹性不足以解释宏观中的风险波动。

                      # ※ Example 2 风险溢价之谜（部分修正）

                      下面仅考查居民端的行为，经济中存在两种资产，一种是无风险资产 AtfA_t^fAtf​，其利率 RtfR_t^fRtf​ 为确定值；另一种是风险资产 AtA_tAt​，其利率为 RtR_tRt​，{Rt}\{R_t\}{Rt​} 是一个随机过程。居民的劳动收入为 WtNtW_tN_tWt​Nt​，居民效用形式如下：

                      Et∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k,Xt+k){\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} \beta^k u(C_{t+k},X_{t+k}) Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct+k​,Xt+k​)

                      其中 Xt+kX_{t+k}Xt+k​ 为一个外生的序列。

                      居民面临的预算约束如下：

                      Ct+k+At+k+1+At+k+1f=Rt+kfAt+kf+Rt+kAt+k+Wt+kNt+k+TtC_{t+k}+A_{t+k+1}+A_{t+k+1}^f = R_{t+k}^fA_{t+k}^f+R_{t+k}A_{t+k}+ W_{t+k}N_{t+k}+ T_t Ct+k​+At+k+1​+At+k+1f​=Rt+kf​At+kf​+Rt+k​At+k​+Wt+k​Nt+k​+Tt​

                      求解以下问题：

                      （1） 写出居民的值函数问题。

                      解：

                      V(At,Atf)=△max⁡Ct+k,At+k+1,At+k+1fEt∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k,Xt+k)s.t.Ct+k+At+k+1+At+k+1f=Rt+kfAt+kf+Rt+kAt+k+Wt+kNt+k+Tt\begin{align*} V(A_t,A_t^f)\stackrel{\triangle}{=} \max_{C_{t+k},A_{t+k+1},A_{t+k+1}^f}\quad & {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty}\beta^k u(C_{t+k},X_{t+k})\\ & \text{s.t.} \quad C_{t+k}+A_{t+k+1}+A_{t+k+1}^f = R_{t+k}^f A_{t+k}^f + R_{t+k}A_{t+k}+ W_{t+k}N_{t+k}+T_t\\ \end{align*}V(At​,Atf​)=△Ct+k​,At+k+1​,At+k+1f​max​​Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct+k​,Xt+k​)s.t.Ct+k​+At+k+1​+At+k+1f​=Rt+kf​At+kf​+Rt+k​At+k​+Wt+k​Nt+k​+Tt​​

                      V(At,Atf)=max⁡Ct,At+1,At+1fu(Ct,Xt)+βEtV(At+1,At+1f)s.t.Ct+At+1+At+1f=RtfAtf+RtAt+WtNt+Tt\begin{align*} V(A_t,A_t^f){=} \max_{C_{t},A_{t+1},A_{t+1}^f}\quad & u(C_t,X_t)+\beta{\mathbb E}_t V(A_{t+1},A_{t+1}^f)\\ & \text{s.t.} \quad C_{t}+A_{t+1}+A_{t+1}^f = R_{t}^f A_{t}^f + R_{t}A_{t}+ W_{t}N_{t}+T_t\\ \end{align*}V(At​,Atf​)=Ct​,At+1​,At+1f​max​​u(Ct​,Xt​)+βEt​V(At+1​,At+1f​)s.t.Ct​+At+1​+At+1f​=Rtf​Atf​+Rt​At​+Wt​Nt​+Tt​​

                      V(At,Atf)=max⁡Ct,At+1,At+1fu(Ct,Xt)+βEtV(At+1,At+1f)−λt(Ct+At+1+At+1f−RtfAtf−RtAt−WtNt−Tt)\begin{align*}V(A_t,A_t^f){=} \max_{C_{t},A_{t+1},A_{t+1}^f} & u(C_t,X_t)+\beta{\mathbb E}_t V(A_{t+1},A_{t+1}^f)\\& -\lambda_t(C_{t}+A_{t+1}+A_{t+1}^f - R_{t}^f A_{t}^f - R_{t}A_{t}- W_{t}N_{t}-T_t)\end{align*} V(At​,Atf​)=Ct​,At+1​,At+1f​max​​u(Ct​,Xt​)+βEt​V(At+1​,At+1f​)−λt​(Ct​+At+1​+At+1f​−Rtf​Atf​−Rt​At​−Wt​Nt​−Tt​)​

                      （2） 求解居民的 Euler 方程。

                      解：

                      对 CtC_tCt​ 求导

                      ∂u∂Ct(Ct,Xt)=λt(1)\frac{\partial u}{\partial C_t}(C_t,X_t)=\lambda_t\tag{1} ∂Ct​∂u​(Ct​,Xt​)=λt​(1)

                      对 At+1A_{t+1}At+1​ 求导

                      βEt∂V∂A(At+1,At+1f)=λt(2)\beta{\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial V}{\partial A}(A_{t+1},{A_{t+1}^f})=\lambda_t\tag{2} βEt​∂A∂V​(At+1​,At+1f​)=λt​(2)

                      对 At+1fA_{t+1}^fAt+1f​ 求导

                      βEt∂V∂Af(At+1,At+1f)=λt(3)\beta{\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial V}{\partial A^f}(A_{t+1},{A_{t+1}^f})=\lambda_t\tag{3} βEt​∂Af∂V​(At+1​,At+1f​)=λt​(3)

                      对 AtA_tAt​ 使用包络定理

                      ∂V∂A(At,Atf)=λtRt(4)\frac{\partial V}{\partial A}(A_t,A_t^f)=\lambda_tR_t\tag{4} ∂A∂V​(At​,Atf​)=λt​Rt​(4)

                      对 AtfA_t^fAtf​ 使用包络定理

                      ∂V∂Af(At,Atf)=λtRtf(5)\frac{\partial V}{\partial A^f}(A_t,A_t^f)=\lambda_tR_t^f\tag{5} ∂Af∂V​(At​,Atf​)=λt​Rtf​(5)

                      (i) 对 (4) 延后一期得

                      ∂V∂A(At+1,At+1f)=λt+1Rt+1=∂u∂C(Ct+1,Xt+1)Rt+1\frac{\partial V}{\partial A}(A_{t+1},A_{t+1}^f)=\lambda_{t+1}R_{t+1}=\frac{\partial u}{\partial C}(C_{t+1},X_{t+1})R_{t+1} ∂A∂V​(At+1​,At+1f​)=λt+1​Rt+1​=∂C∂u​(Ct+1​,Xt+1​)Rt+1​

                      代入 (2) 式可得

                      βEt∂u∂C(Ct+1,Xt+1)Rt+1=λt=∂u∂Ct(Ct,Xt)\beta {\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial u}{\partial C}(C_{t+1},X_{t+1})R_{t+1}=\lambda_t = \frac{\partial u}{\partial C_t}(C_t,X_t) βEt​∂C∂u​(Ct+1​,Xt+1​)Rt+1​=λt​=∂Ct​∂u​(Ct​,Xt​)

                      Etβ∂u∂C(Ct+1,Xt+1)∂u∂Ct(Ct,Xt)Rt+1=1{\mathbb E}_t \beta\frac {\frac{\partial u}{\partial C}(C_{t+1},X_{t+1})}{\frac{\partial u}{\partial C_t}(C_t,X_t)}R_{t+1}=1 Et​β∂Ct​∂u​(Ct​,Xt​)∂C∂u​(Ct+1​,Xt+1​)​Rt+1​=1

                      (ii) 对 (5) 延后一期得

                      ∂V∂Af(At+1,At+1f)=λt+1Rt+1f=∂u∂C(Ct+1,Xt+1)Rt+1f\frac{\partial V}{\partial A^f}(A_{t+1},A_{t+1}^f)=\lambda_{t+1}R_{t+1}^f=\frac{\partial u}{\partial C}(C_{t+1},X_{t+1})R_{t+1}^f ∂Af∂V​(At+1​,At+1f​)=λt+1​Rt+1f​=∂C∂u​(Ct+1​,Xt+1​)Rt+1f​

                      代入 (3) 式可得

                      βEt∂u∂C(Ct+1,Xt+1)Rt+1f=λt=∂u∂Ct(Ct,Xt)\beta {\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial u}{\partial C}(C_{t+1},X_{t+1})R_{t+1}^f=\lambda_t = \frac{\partial u}{\partial C_t}(C_t,X_t) βEt​∂C∂u​(Ct+1​,Xt+1​)Rt+1f​=λt​=∂Ct​∂u​(Ct​,Xt​)

                      Etβ∂u∂C(Ct+1,Xt+1)∂u∂Ct(Ct,Xt)Rt+1f=1{\mathbb E}_t \beta\frac {\frac{\partial u}{\partial C}(C_{t+1},X_{t+1})}{\frac{\partial u}{\partial C_t}(C_t,X_t)}R_{t+1}^f=1 Et​β∂Ct​∂u​(Ct​,Xt​)∂C∂u​(Ct+1​,Xt+1​)​Rt+1f​=1

                      {Etβ∂u∂C(Ct+1,Xt+1)∂u∂Ct(Ct,Xt)Rt+1=1Etβ∂u∂C(Ct+1,Xt+1)∂u∂Ct(Ct,Xt)Rt+1f=1(6)\begin{cases}{\mathbb E}_t \beta\frac {\frac{\partial u}{\partial C}(C_{t+1},X_{t+1})}{\frac{\partial u}{\partial C_t}(C_t,X_t)}R_{t+1}=1\\ {\mathbb E}_t \beta\frac {\frac{\partial u}{\partial C}(C_{t+1},X_{t+1})}{\frac{\partial u}{\partial C_t}(C_t,X_t)}R_{t+1}^f=1\end{cases}\tag{6}⎩⎨⎧​Et​β∂Ct​∂u​(Ct​,Xt​)∂C∂u​(Ct+1​,Xt+1​)​Rt+1​=1Et​β∂Ct​∂u​(Ct​,Xt​)∂C∂u​(Ct+1​,Xt+1​)​Rt+1f​=1​(6)

                      （3） 令 Rt+1e=Rt+1−Rt+1fR_{t+1}^e = R_{t+1}-R_{t+1}^fRt+1e​=Rt+1​−Rt+1f​ 为风险超额收益，令 Mt,t+1=βu′(Ct+1)u′(Ct)M_{t,t+1} = \beta \frac{u'(C_{t+1})}{u'(C_t)}Mt,t+1​=βu′(Ct​)u′(Ct+1​)​，求关于 Et(Rt+1e){\mathbb E}_t (R_{t+1}^e)Et​(Rt+1e​) 的表示。

                      解：

                      由 (6) 两式相减可得

                      EtMt,t+1Rt+1e=0{\mathbb E}_t M_{t,t+1} R_{t+1}^e =0 Et​Mt,t+1​Rt+1e​=0

                      因为

                      Cov(X,Y)=E[XY]−E[X]E[Y]\text{Cov}(X,Y)=E[XY]-E[X]E[Y] Cov(X,Y)=E[XY]−E[X]E[Y]

                      令 X=Mt,t+1,Y=Rt+1eX=M_{t,t+1},Y=R_{t+1}^eX=Mt,t+1​,Y=Rt+1e​ 可得

                      Covt(Mt,t+1,Rt+1e)=Et[Mt,t+1Rt+1e]−Et[Mt,t+1]Et[Rt+1e]\text{Cov}_t(M_{t,t+1},R_{t+1}^e)={\mathbb E}_t[M_{t,t+1}R_{t+1}^e]-{\mathbb E}_t[M_{t,t+1}]{\mathbb E}_t[R_{t+1}^e] Covt​(Mt,t+1​,Rt+1e​)=Et​[Mt,t+1​Rt+1e​]−Et​[Mt,t+1​]Et​[Rt+1e​]

                      Et[Rt+1e]=−Covt(Mt,t+1,Rt+1e)Et[Mt,t+1](7){\mathbb E}_t[R_{t+1}^e]=-\frac{\text{Cov}_t(M_{t,t+1},R_{t+1}^e)}{{\mathbb E}_t[M_{t,t+1}]}\tag{7} Et​[Rt+1e​]=−Et​[Mt,t+1​]Covt​(Mt,t+1​,Rt+1e​)​(7)

                      （4） 令 c^t=Ct+1−CtCt\hat c_t=\frac{C_{t+1}-C_t}{C_t}c^t​=Ct​Ct+1​−Ct​​，若

                      Covt[∂u∂C(Ct+1,Xt+1),Rt+1e]=Covt(c^t+1,Rt+1e)×Et∂2u/∂C2(Ct+1,Xt+1)Ct+1∂u/∂C(Ct+1,Xt+1)×Et∂u∂C(Ct+1,Xt+1)\begin{align*}& \quad \text{Cov}_t\left[\frac{\partial u}{\partial C}(C_{t+1},X_{t+1}) , R_{t+1}^e\right]\\& =\text{Cov}_t(\hat c_{t+1},R_{t+1}^e)\times {\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial ^2u/\partial C^2(C_{t+1},X_{t+1})C_{t+1}}{\partial u/\partial C(C_{t+1},X_{t+1})}\times{\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial u}{\partial C}(C_{t+1},X_{t+1})\end{align*} ​Covt​[∂C∂u​(Ct+1​,Xt+1​),Rt+1e​]=Covt​(c^t+1​,Rt+1e​)×Et​∂u/∂C(Ct+1​,Xt+1​)∂2u/∂C2(Ct+1​,Xt+1​)Ct+1​​×Et​∂C∂u​(Ct+1​,Xt+1​)​

                      求 Et[Rt+1e]{\mathbb E}_t[R_{t+1}^e]Et​[Rt+1e​] 与 Cov(c^t,Rt+1e)\text{Cov}(\hat c_t,R_{t+1}^e)Cov(c^t​,Rt+1e​) 的关系。

                      解：

                      Covt(Mt,t+1,Rt+1e)=Covt[βuC(Ct+1,Xt+1)uC(Ct,Xt),Rt+1e]=β∂u(Ct,Xt)/∂CCovt[∂u∂C(Ct+1,Xt+1),Rt+1e]=βEt∂u(Ct+1,Xt+1)/∂C∂u(Ct,Xt)/∂C⏟EtMt,t+1Covt(c^t+1,Rt+1e)Et∂2u/∂C2(Ct+1,Xt+1)Ct+1∂u/∂C(Ct+1,Xt+1)\begin{align*}& \quad \;\text{Cov}_t(M_{t,t+1},R_{t+1}^e)\\ & =\text{Cov}_t\left[\beta\frac{u_C(C_{t+1},X_{t+1})}{u_C(C_{t},X_{t})},R_{t+1}^e\right]\\ & =\frac{\beta}{\partial u(C_t,X_t)/\partial C}\text{Cov}_t\left[\frac{\partial u}{\partial C}(C_{t+1},X_{t+1}) , R_{t+1}^e\right]\\ & =\underbrace{\beta{\mathbb E}_t\frac{\partial u(C_{t+1},X_{t+1})/{\partial C}}{\partial u(C_t,X_t)/\partial C}}_{\ {\mathbb E}_t M_{t,t+1}}\text{Cov}_t(\hat c_{t+1},R_{t+1}^e) {\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial ^2u/\partial C^2(C_{t+1},X_{t+1})C_{t+1}}{\partial u/\partial C(C_{t+1},X_{t+1})} \end{align*}​Covt​(Mt,t+1​,Rt+1e​)=Covt​[βuC​(Ct​,Xt​)uC​(Ct+1​,Xt+1​)​,Rt+1e​]=∂u(Ct​,Xt​)/∂Cβ​Covt​[∂C∂u​(Ct+1​,Xt+1​),Rt+1e​]=Et​Mt,t+1​βEt​∂u(Ct​,Xt​)/∂C∂u(Ct+1​,Xt+1​)/∂C​​​Covt​(c^t+1​,Rt+1e​)Et​∂u/∂C(Ct+1​,Xt+1​)∂2u/∂C2(Ct+1​,Xt+1​)Ct+1​​​

                      代入 (7) 可得

                      EtRt+1e=−EtuCC(Ct+1,Xt+1)Ct+1uC(Ct+1,Xt+1)×Covt(c^t+1,Rt+1e){\mathbb E}_t R_{t+1}^e = - {\mathbb E}_t \frac{u_{CC}(C_{t+1},X_{t+1})C_{t+1}\;}{u_C(C_{t+1},X_{t+1})}\times\text{Cov}_t(\hat c_{t+1},R_{t+1}^e) Et​Rt+1e​=−Et​uC​(Ct+1​,Xt+1​)uCC​(Ct+1​,Xt+1​)Ct+1​​×Covt​(c^t+1​,Rt+1e​)

                      （5） 令 u(Ct,Xt)=(Ct−Xt)1−σ1−σ,Xt≥0u(C_t,X_t)=\frac{(C_t-X_t)^{1-\sigma}}{1-\sigma},X_t\geq0u(Ct​,Xt​)=1−σ(Ct​−Xt​)1−σ​,Xt​≥0。已知 EtRt+1e>0{\mathbb E}_t R_{t+1}^e >0Et​Rt+1e​>0，Covt(Rt+1e,c^t+1)>0\text{Cov}_t(R_{t+1}^e,\hat c_{t+1})>0Covt​(Rt+1e​,c^t+1​)>0。求解随着 Xt+1X_{t+1}Xt+1​ 增大，σ\sigmaσ 会怎样变化？

                      解：

                      uC=(Ct−Xt)−σu_C= (C_t-X_t)^{-\sigma} uC​=(Ct​−Xt​)−σ

                      uCC=−σ(Ct−Xt)−σ−1u_{CC}=-\sigma(C_t-X_t)^{-\sigma-1} uCC​=−σ(Ct​−Xt​)−σ−1

                      EtuCC(Ct+1,Xt+1)uC(Ct+1,Xt+1)=−σEtCt+1Ct+1−Xt+1{\mathbb E_t} \frac{u_{CC} (C_{t+1},X_{t+1})}{u_C(C_{t+1},X_{t+1})}=-\sigma {\mathbb E}_t \frac{C_{t+1}}{C_{t+1}-X_{t+1}} Et​uC​(Ct+1​,Xt+1​)uCC​(Ct+1​,Xt+1​)​=−σEt​Ct+1​−Xt+1​Ct+1​​

                      σ=EtRt+1eCovt(Rt+1e,c^t+1)1EtCt+1Ct+1−Xt+1\sigma = \frac{\ {\mathbb E}_t R_{t+1}^e}{\text{Cov}_t (R_{t+1}^e ,\hat c_{t+1})}\frac{1}{\ {\mathbb E}_t \frac{C_{t+1}}{C_{t+1}-X_{t+1}}} σ=Covt​(Rt+1e​,c^t+1​)Et​Rt+1e​​Et​Ct+1​−Xt+1​Ct+1​​1​

                      当 Xt+1X_{t+1}Xt+1​ 上升，σ\sigmaσ 下降。

                      （6） 令 St=Ct−XtCtS_t = \frac{C_t-X_t }{C_t}St​=Ct​Ct​−Xt​​，问 Mt,t+1=βuC(Ct+1,Xt+1)uC(Ct,Xt)M_{t,t+1}= \beta \frac{u_C(C_{t+1},X_{t+1})}{u_C(C_t,X_t)}Mt,t+1​=βuC​(Ct​,Xt​)uC​(Ct+1​,Xt+1​)​ 在 u=(Ct−Xt)1−σ1−σu= \frac{(C_t - X_t)^{1-\sigma}}{1-\sigma}u=1−σ(Ct​−Xt​)1−σ​ 时如何表示为 Ct+1/CtC_{t+1}/{C_t}Ct+1​/Ct​ 与 St+1/StS_{t+1}/S_tSt+1​/St​ 的方程。

                      解：

                      Mt,t+1=β(Ct+1−Xt+1)−σ(Ct−Xt)−σ=β(Ct+1Ct)−σ((Ct+1−Xt+1)/Ct+1(Ct−Xt)/Ct)−σ=β(Ct+1Ct)−σ(St+1St)−σ\begin{align*}M_{t,t+1} & =\beta \frac{(C_{t+1}-X_{t+1})^{-\sigma}}{(C_t-X_t)^{-\sigma}}\\ & = \beta \left( \frac {C_{t+1}}{C_t}\right)^{-\sigma}\left( \frac{(C_{t+1}-X_{t+1})/C_{t+1}}{(C_t-X_t)/C_t}\right)^{-\sigma}\\ & =\beta \left( \frac {C_{t+1}}{C_t}\right)^{-\sigma} \left( \frac {S_{t+1}}{S_t}\right)^{-\sigma} \end{align*}Mt,t+1​​=β(Ct​−Xt​)−σ(Ct+1​−Xt+1​)−σ​=β(Ct​Ct+1​​)−σ((Ct​−Xt​)/Ct​(Ct+1​−Xt+1​)/Ct+1​​)−σ=β(Ct​Ct+1​​)−σ(St​St+1​​)−σ​

                      # Example 3 Epstein-Zin 效用

                      已知居民效用形式如下

                      V(At,Atf)=max⁡Ct,At+1f,At+1{(1−β)Ct1−σ+β[EtV(At+1,At+1f)1−r]1−σ1−r}11−σs.t.Ct+At+1+At+1f=RtAt+RtfAtf+WtNt+Tt\begin{align*}V(A_t,A_t^f) = \max_{C_t,A_{t+1}^f,A_{t+1}} \quad & \left\{ (1-\beta)C_t^{1-\sigma} + \beta \left[{\mathbb E}_t V(A_{t+1},A_{t+1}^f)^{1-r}\right]^{\frac{1-\sigma}{1-r}}\right\}^{\frac{1}{1-\sigma}}\\ & \text{s.t.} \quad C_t+A_{t+1}+ A_{t+1}^f = R_t A_t + R_t^f A_t ^f+ W_t N_t + T_t \end{align*}V(At​,Atf​)=Ct​,At+1f​,At+1​max​​{(1−β)Ct1−σ​+β[Et​V(At+1​,At+1f​)1−r]1−r1−σ​}1−σ1​s.t.Ct​+At+1​+At+1f​=Rt​At​+Rtf​Atf​+Wt​Nt​+Tt​​

                      (1) 获取欧拉方程。

                      (2) 问 Mt,t+1M_{t,t+1}Mt,t+1​ 与 Rt+1eR_{t+1}^eRt+1e​ 的关系。

                      (3) 分析财富所对应的居民实际财富的利率 Rt+1wR_{t+1}^wRt+1w​。

                      (4) 分析 rrr 的含义，并说明引入 r≠σr\neq \sigmar=σ 对标准情况 (r=σr=\sigmar=σ) 的偏离，有什么作用。

                      (5) 分析此时的 r~t+1w\tilde r_{t+1}^wr~t+1w​ 与 m~t+1\tilde m_{t+1}m~t+1​。

                      # Example 4 异质性收入——私有信息

                      若经济中有 HHH 个居民，对i=1,…,Hi=1,\dots,Hi=1,…,H 的居民，其目标为

                      max⁡Et∑k=0+∞βkCt,t+k1−σ−11−σs.t.Wi,t+k+1=Rt+k+1(Wi,t+k−Ci,t+k)\max \quad {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} \beta^k \frac{C_{t,t+k}^{1-\sigma}-1}{1-\sigma}\\ \text{s.t.} \quad W_{i,t+k+1} = R_{t+k+1} (W_{i,t+k}-C_{i,t+k})maxEt​k=0∑+∞​βk1−σCt,t+k1−σ​−1​s.t.Wi,t+k+1​=Rt+k+1​(Wi,t+k​−Ci,t+k​)

                      (1) 求居民 iii 的随机贴现因子 Mt+1iM_{t+1}^iMt+1i​ 以及对应的欧拉方程。

                      (2) 求 Rt+1R_{t+1}Rt+1​ 的表示。

                      # ※ Example 5 无风险利率之谜

                      已知 Mt,t+1M_{t,t+1}Mt,t+1​ 是随机贴现因子，Rt+1−Rt+1f=Rt+1eR_{t+1}-R_{t+1}^f = R_{t+1}^eRt+1​−Rt+1f​=Rt+1e​，且 EtMt,t+1Rt+1f=1{\mathbb E}_t M_{t,t+1} R_{t+1}^f=1Et​Mt,t+1​Rt+1f​=1，EtMt,t+1Rt+1e=0{\mathbb E}_t M_{t,t+1} R_{t+1}^e = 0Et​Mt,t+1​Rt+1e​=0。

                      （1） 用 Cov(Mt,t+1,Rt+1)\text{Cov} (M_{t,t+1},R_{t+1})Cov(Mt,t+1​,Rt+1​) 表示 EtRt+1−Rt+1fRt+1f{\mathbb E}_t \frac{R_{t+1}-R_{t+1}^f}{R_{t+1}^f}Et​Rt+1f​Rt+1​−Rt+1f​​。

                      解：

                      EtMt,t+1Rt+1e=0{\mathbb E}_t M_{t,t+1} R_{t+1}^e = 0 Et​Mt,t+1​Rt+1e​=0

                      Cov(Mt,t+1,Rt+1e)+EtMt,t+1×EtRt+1e=0\text{Cov} (M_{t,t+1}, R_{t+1}^e)+{\mathbb E}_t M_{t,t+1}\times {\mathbb E}_tR_{t+1}^e=0 Cov(Mt,t+1​,Rt+1e​)+Et​Mt,t+1​×Et​Rt+1e​=0

                      1Rt+1fEtRt+1e=−Cov(Mt,t+1,Rt+1e)=−Cov(Mt,t+1,Rt+1−Rt+1f)=−Cov(Mt,t+1,Rt+1)\frac{1}{R_{t+1}^f}{\mathbb E}_tR_{t+1}^e=-\text{Cov} (M_{t,t+1}, R_{t+1}^e)=-\text{Cov} (M_{t,t+1}, R_{t+1}-R_{t+1}^f)=-\text{Cov} (M_{t,t+1}, R_{t+1}) Rt+1f​1​Et​Rt+1e​=−Cov(Mt,t+1​,Rt+1e​)=−Cov(Mt,t+1​,Rt+1​−Rt+1f​)=−Cov(Mt,t+1​,Rt+1​)

                      EtRt+1−Rt+1fRt+1f=−Cov(Mt,t+1,Rt+1){\mathbb E}_t \frac{R_{t+1}-R_{t+1}^f}{R_{t+1}^f}= -\text{Cov} (M_{t,t+1}, R_{t+1}) Et​Rt+1f​Rt+1​−Rt+1f​​=−Cov(Mt,t+1​,Rt+1​)

                      （2） 若 Mt,t+1=β(Ct+1Ct)−σM_{t,t+1}= \beta \left(\frac{C_{t+1}}{C_t} \right)^{-\sigma}Mt,t+1​=β(Ct​Ct+1​​)−σ，令 δ=1β−1\delta = \frac{1}{\beta}-1δ=β1​−1，c^t+1=Ct+1−CtCt\hat c_{t+1}= \frac{C_{t+1}-C_t}{C_t}c^t+1​=Ct​Ct+1​−Ct​​，有 μ=Etc^t\mu = \mathbb E_t \hat c_tμ=Et​c^t​， σc2=Var(c^t+1)\sigma^2_c = \text{Var}(\hat c_{t+1})σc2​=Var(c^t+1​)，σR2=Var(Rt+1)\sigma^2_R = \text{Var}(R_{t+1})σR2​=Var(Rt+1​)，ρ=Corr(c^t+1,Rt)\rho = \text{Corr} (\hat c_{t+1},R_t)ρ=Corr(c^t+1​,Rt​)。求 Rt+1fR_{t+1}^fRt+1f​ 与 EtRt+1\mathbb E_t R_{t+1}Et​Rt+1​ 的近似表达。

                      解：

                      Rt+1f=1EtMt,t+1=1β1Et(Ct+1−CtCt+1)−σ=(1+δ)×1Et(1+c^t+1)−σ(1)R_{t+1}^{f}=\frac{1}{\mathbb{E}_{t} M_{t,t+1}}=\frac{1}{\beta} \frac{1}{\mathbb{E}_{t}\left(\frac{C_{t+1}-C t}{C_{t}}+1\right)^{-\sigma}}=(1+\delta) \times \frac{1}{\mathbb{E}_{t}\left(1+\hat{c}_{t+1}\right)^{-\sigma}} \tag{1} Rt+1f​=Et​Mt,t+1​1​=β1​Et​(Ct​Ct+1​−Ct​+1)−σ1​=(1+δ)×Et​(1+c^t+1​)−σ1​(1)

                      应用二阶泰勒展开，可得

                      (1+c^t+1)−σ=[1+μ+(c^t+1−μ)]−σ≅1−σc^t+1+σ(σ+1)2(c^t+1−μ+μ)2=1−σc^t+1+σ(σ+1)2(c^t+1−μ)2+σ(σ+1)2μ2+σ(σ+1)μ(c^t+1−μ)\begin{align*}(1+ \hat c_{t+1})^{-\sigma}& =[1+\mu + (\hat c_{t+1}-\mu)]^{-\sigma}\cong 1-\sigma \hat c_{t+1}+\frac{\sigma(\sigma+1)}{2}(\hat c_{t+1}-\mu+\mu )^2\\ & =1-\sigma \hat c_{t+1}+\frac{\sigma(\sigma+1)}{2}\left(\hat c_{t+1}-\mu\right)^{2}+\frac{\sigma(\sigma+1)}{2} \mu^{2}+\sigma(\sigma+1) \mu\left(\hat c_{t+1}-\mu\right)\end{align*}(1+c^t+1​)−σ​=[1+μ+(c^t+1​−μ)]−σ≅1−σc^t+1​+2σ(σ+1)​(c^t+1​−μ+μ)2=1−σc^t+1​+2σ(σ+1)​(c^t+1​−μ)2+2σ(σ+1)​μ2+σ(σ+1)μ(c^t+1​−μ)​

                      Et(1+c^t+1)−σ≅Et[1−σc^t+1+σ(σ+1)2(c^t+1−μ)2+σ(σ+1)2μ2+(σ+1)σ(c^t+1−μ)]=1−σμ+σ(σ+1)2σc2+σ(σ+1)2μ2\begin{align*}\mathbb{E}_{t}\left(1+\hat c_{t+1}\right)^{-\sigma} & \cong \mathbb{E}_{t}\left[ 1-\sigma \hat c_{t+1}+\frac{\sigma(\sigma+1)}{2}\left( \hat c_{t+1}-\mu \right)^{2}+\frac{\sigma(\sigma+1)}{2} \mu^{2}+(\sigma+1) \sigma\left(\hat{c}_{t+1}-\mu\right) \right]\\ & = 1-\sigma \mu + \frac{\sigma(\sigma+1)}2 \sigma^2_c+\frac{\sigma(\sigma+1)}2 \mu^2\end{align*}Et​(1+c^t+1​)−σ​≅Et​[1−σc^t+1​+2σ(σ+1)​(c^t+1​−μ)2+2σ(σ+1)​μ2+(σ+1)σ(c^t+1​−μ)]=1−σμ+2σ(σ+1)​σc2​+2σ(σ+1)​μ2​

                      因为 μ\muμ 很低，我们可以忽略 μ2\mu^2μ2 项。

                      Et(1+c^t+1)−σ≈1−σμ+σ(σ+1)2σc2\mathbb{E}_{t}\left(1+\hat c_{t+1}\right)^{-\sigma} \approx 1-\sigma \mu + \frac{\sigma(\sigma+1)}2 \sigma^2_c Et​(1+c^t+1​)−σ≈1−σμ+2σ(σ+1)​σc2​

                      代入 (1) 式可得

                      Rt+1f=(1+δ)×1Et(1+c^t+1)−σ≈(1+δ)11−σμ+σ(σ+1)2σc2≈1+δ+σμ−σ(σ+1)2σc2+δ(σμ−σ(σ+1)2σc2)\begin{align*}R_{t+1}^{f}& =(1+\delta) \times \frac{1}{\mathbb{E}_{t}\left(1+\hat{c}_{t+1}\right)^{-\sigma}}\\ & \approx (1+\delta)\frac1{1-\sigma\mu+\frac{\sigma(\sigma+1)}2 \sigma^2_c}\\ & \approx 1+ \delta + \sigma\mu-\frac{\sigma(\sigma+1)}2 \sigma^2_c+\delta \left(\sigma\mu -\frac{\sigma(\sigma+1)}2 \sigma^2_c\right) \end{align*}Rt+1f​​=(1+δ)×Et​(1+c^t+1​)−σ1​≈(1+δ)1−σμ+2σ(σ+1)​σc2​1​≈1+δ+σμ−2σ(σ+1)​σc2​+δ(σμ−2σ(σ+1)​σc2​)​

                      因为 δ\deltaδ 很小，所以 δ(σμ−σ(σ+1)2σc2)\delta \left(\sigma\mu -\frac{\sigma(\sigma+1)}2 \sigma^2_c\right)δ(σμ−2σ(σ+1)​σc2​) 可忽略，近似得到

                      Rt+1f≈1+δ+σμ−σ(σ+1)2σc2R_{t+1}^{f}\approx 1+ \delta + \sigma\mu-\frac{\sigma(\sigma+1)}2 \sigma^2_c Rt+1f​≈1+δ+σμ−2σ(σ+1)​σc2​

                      EtRt+1=Rt+1f−Rt+1fCov⁡(Mt,t+1,Rt+1)=Rt+1f−Cov⁡(Rt+1fMt,t+1,Rt+1)\mathbb{E}_ t R_{t+1}=R_{t+1}^{f}-R_{t+1}^{f} \operatorname{Cov}\left(M_{t,t+1}, R_{t+1}\right)=R_{t+1}^{f}-\operatorname{Cov}\left(R_{t+1}^{f} M_{t,t+1}, R_{t+1}\right) \\ Et​Rt+1​=Rt+1f​−Rt+1f​Cov(Mt,t+1​,Rt+1​)=Rt+1f​−Cov(Rt+1f​Mt,t+1​,Rt+1​)

                      Rt+1fMt,t+1≈(1+δ)Mt,t+1+(σμ−σ(σ+1)2σc2)Mt,t+1\begin{align*}R_{t+1}^f M_{t,t+1}& \approx (1+\delta)M_{t,t+1}+ \left(\sigma\mu-\frac{\sigma(\sigma+1)}2 \sigma^2_c\right)M_{t,t+1} \end{align*} Rt+1f​Mt,t+1​​≈(1+δ)Mt,t+1​+(σμ−2σ(σ+1)​σc2​)Mt,t+1​​

                      因为 (1+δ)=1/β(1+\delta)=1/\beta(1+δ)=1/β，以及第二项足够小可忽略，我们可得

                      Rt+1fMt,t+1≈(Ct+1−CtCt+1)−σ=(c^t+1+1)−σ≈1−σc^t+1\begin{align*}R_{t+1}^f M_{t,t+1}& \approx \left(\frac{C_{t+1}-C_t}{C_t}+1\right)^{-\sigma} = (\hat c_{t+1}+1)^{-\sigma} \approx 1-\sigma \hat c_{t+1}\end{align*} Rt+1f​Mt,t+1​​≈(Ct​Ct+1​−Ct​​+1)−σ=(c^t+1​+1)−σ≈1−σc^t+1​​

                      从而可得

                      Cov⁡(Rt+1fMt,t+1Rt+1)≈−σCov⁡(c^t+1,Rt+1)\operatorname {Cov}(R_{t+1}^f M_{t,t+1}R_{t+1})\approx -\sigma \operatorname {Cov}(\hat c_{t+1},R_{t+1}) Cov(Rt+1f​Mt,t+1​Rt+1​)≈−σCov(c^t+1​,Rt+1​)

                      EtRt+1≈Rt+1f+σCov⁡(c^t+1,Rt+1)=Rt+1f+σCorr⁡(Rt+1,c^t+1)ρVar⁡(c^t+1)Var⁡(Rt+1)\mathbb{E}_ t R_{t+1}\approx R_{t+1}^f + \sigma \operatorname {Cov}(\hat c_{t+1},R_{t+1})=R_{t+1}^f + \sigma\underset{\rho}{\operatorname {Corr}(R_{t+1},\hat c_{t+1})} \sqrt {\operatorname {Var}(\hat c_{t+1})\operatorname {Var}(R_{t+1})} Et​Rt+1​≈Rt+1f​+σCov(c^t+1​,Rt+1​)=Rt+1f​+σρCorr(Rt+1​,c^t+1​)​Var(c^t+1​)Var(Rt+1​)​

                      EtRt+1≈Rt+1f+σCov⁡(c^t+1,Rt+1)=Rt+1f+σCorr⁡(Rt+1,c^t+1)Var⁡(c^t+1)Var⁡(Rt+1)=Rt+1f+ρσ(σRσc)\begin{align*}\mathbb{E}_ t R_{t+1}& \approx R_{t+1}^f + \sigma \operatorname {Cov}(\hat c_{t+1},R_{t+1})\\ & =R_{t+1}^f + \sigma\operatorname {Corr}(R_{t+1},\hat c_{t+1})\sqrt {\operatorname {Var}(\hat c_{t+1}){\operatorname{Var}(R_{t+1})}}\\ & = R_{t+1}^f +\rho\sigma (\sigma_R\sigma_c) \end{align*}Et​Rt+1​​≈Rt+1f​+σCov(c^t+1​,Rt+1​)=Rt+1f​+σCorr(Rt+1​,c^t+1​)Var(c^t+1​)Var(Rt+1​)​=Rt+1f​+ρσ(σR​σc​)​

                      （3） 解释“风险溢价之谜”与“无风险利率之谜”

                      解：

                      Rt+1f≈1+δ+σμ−σ(σ+1)2Var(c^t+1)R_{t+1}^{f}\approx 1+ \delta + \sigma\mu-\frac{\sigma(\sigma+1)}2 \text{Var} (\hat c_{t+1}) Rt+1f​≈1+δ+σμ−2σ(σ+1)​Var(c^t+1​)

                      EtRt+1=Rt+1f+ρσ(σRσc)\begin{align*}\mathbb{E}_ t R_{t+1} = R_{t+1}^f +\rho \sigma (\sigma_R\sigma_c)\end{align*} Et​Rt+1​=Rt+1f​+ρσ(σR​σc​)​

                      σR,σc,ρ,μ,δ\sigma_R,\sigma_c,\rho,\mu,\deltaσR​,σc​,ρ,μ,δ 均可观测，但使 Rt+1fR_{t+1}^fRt+1f​ 和 EtRt+1−Rt+1f{\mathbb E}_t R_{t+1} - R_{t+1}^fEt​Rt+1​−Rt+1f​ 与实际数据匹配的 σ\sigmaσ，与微观数据并不匹配，即用宏观的贴现因子 δ\deltaδ，消费增速 μ\muμ，消费方差 σC2\sigma_C^2σC2​ 与利率方差 σR2\sigma_R^2σR2​ 和消费变化率 c^t+1\hat c_{t+1}c^t+1​ 与 Rt+1R_{t+1}Rt+1​ 的相关系数 ρ\rhoρ，配合实际的风险规避系数 σ\sigmaσ， 并不足以解释资产的风险溢价水平和无风险利率水平。

                      实际上，对于无风险利率而言，δ≥0.5%,μ≥5%,σc2≤1%\delta\geq 0.5\%,\mu\geq 5\%,\sigma_c^2\leq 1\%δ≥0.5%,μ≥5%,σc2​≤1%，而实际的无风险利率在 1.031.031.03 左右，即

                      1.03≈1+0.5%+σ[5%−σ+12×1%]1.03 \approx 1+ 0.5\%+ \sigma [5\%-\frac{\sigma+1}2 \times 1\%] 1.03≈1+0.5%+σ[5%−2σ+1​×1%]

                      可得

                      σ≈{0.8, if σ<18, if σ>1\sigma \approx \begin{cases}0.8 ,\quad& \text{ if } \sigma < 1 \\ 8 ,\quad& \text{ if } \sigma > 1 \end{cases}σ≈{0.8,8,​ if σ<1 if σ>1​

                      而实际中 σ\sigmaσ 的微观值，表示风险规避时在 1∼21\sim21∼2 之间，和上述区间并不匹配，而对于风险溢价，Example 1 的第五问也指出微观值的不匹配。

                      （4） 若 Mt,t+1=β(Ct+1Ct)−σ(Zt+1Zt)−ηM_{t,t+1}= \beta \left( \frac{C_{t+1}}{C_t}\right)^{-\sigma} \left( \frac{Z_{t+1}}{Z_t}\right)^{-\eta}Mt,t+1​=β(Ct​Ct+1​​)−σ(Zt​Zt+1​​)−η，记 z^t+1=Zt+1−ZtZt,μc=Etc^t+1,μz=Etz^t+1,Var⁡(z^t+1)=σz2,Var⁡(c^t+1)=σc2,Var⁡(Rt+1)=σR2,Corr⁡(z^t+1,c^t+1)=ρzc,Corr⁡(c^t+1,Rt+1)=ρcR\hat z_{t+1} = \frac{Z_{t+1}-Z_t}{Z_t},\mu_c= {\mathbb E}_t \hat c_{t+1},\mu_z = {\mathbb E}_t \hat z_{t+1}, \operatorname{Var}(\hat z_{t+1})=\sigma_z^2,\operatorname{Var}(\hat c_{t+1})=\sigma_c^2, \operatorname{Var}(R_{t+1})=\sigma_R^2, \operatorname{Corr}(\hat z_{t+1},\hat c_{t+1})=\rho_{zc},\operatorname{Corr}(\hat c_{t+1},R_{t+1})=\rho_{cR}z^t+1​=Zt​Zt+1​−Zt​​,μc​=Et​c^t+1​,μz​=Et​z^t+1​,Var(z^t+1​)=σz2​,Var(c^t+1​)=σc2​,Var(Rt+1​)=σR2​,Corr(z^t+1​,c^t+1​)=ρzc​,Corr(c^t+1​,Rt+1​)=ρcR​。求 Rt+1fR_{t+1}^fRt+1f​ 和 EtRt+1{\mathbb E}_t R_{t+1}Et​Rt+1​ 的表达式。

                      解：

                      Mt,t+1=11+δ(1+c^t+1)−σ(1+z^t+1)−ηM_{t,t+1} = \frac{1}{1+ \delta}(1+\hat c_{t+1})^{-\sigma}(1+\hat z_{t+1})^{-\eta} Mt,t+1​=1+δ1​(1+c^t+1​)−σ(1+z^t+1​)−η

                      其中

                      (1+c^t+1)−σ≈(1−σc^t+1+σ(σ+1)2(c^t+1)2)≈1−σc^t+1+σ(σ+1)2[c^t+1−μc]2≈11+σc^t+1−σ(σ+1)2[c^t+1−μc]2\begin{align*} (1+\hat c_{t+1})^{-\sigma}& \approx (1-\sigma \hat c_{t+1}+\frac{\sigma(\sigma +1)}{2}(\hat c_{t+1})^2)\\ & \approx 1-\sigma \hat c_{t+1}+\frac{\sigma(\sigma+1)}{2}[\hat c_{t+1}-\mu_c]^2\\ & \approx \frac1{1+\sigma \hat c_{t+1}-\frac{\sigma(\sigma+1)}{2}[\hat c_{t+1}-\mu_c]^2} \end{align*}(1+c^t+1​)−σ​≈(1−σc^t+1​+2σ(σ+1)​(c^t+1​)2)≈1−σc^t+1​+2σ(σ+1)​[c^t+1​−μc​]2≈1+σc^t+1​−2σ(σ+1)​[c^t+1​−μc​]21​​

                      (1+z^t+1)−η≈11+ηz^t+1−η(η+1)2[z^t+1−μz]2(1+\hat z_{t+1})^{-\eta}\approx \frac1{1+\eta \hat z_{t+1}-\frac{\eta(\eta+1)}{2}[\hat z_{t+1}-\mu_z]^2} (1+z^t+1​)−η≈1+ηz^t+1​−2η(η+1)​[z^t+1​−μz​]21​

                      从而可以获得

                      Mt,t+1≈11+δ+σc^t+1−σ(σ+1)2[c^t+1−μc]2+ηz^t+1−η(η+1)2[z^t+1−μz]2+ση[z^t+1−μz][c^t+1−μc]M_{t,t+1}\approx \frac1{1+\delta + \sigma \hat c_{t+1}-\frac{\sigma(\sigma+1)}{2}[\hat c_{t+1}-\mu_c]^2+ \eta \hat z_{t+1}-\frac{\eta(\eta+1)}{2}[\hat z_{t+1}-\mu_z]^2+\sigma \eta [\hat z_{t+1}-\mu_z][\hat c_{t+1}-\mu_c]} Mt,t+1​≈1+δ+σc^t+1​−2σ(σ+1)​[c^t+1​−μc​]2+ηz^t+1​−2η(η+1)​[z^t+1​−μz​]2+ση[z^t+1​−μz​][c^t+1​−μc​]1​

                      Rt+1f≈1+δ+σμc+ημz−σ(σ+1)2σc2−η(η+1)2σz2+σηρzcσzσc(2)R_{t+1}^f \approx 1+ \delta + \sigma \mu_c +\eta\mu_z -\frac{\sigma (\sigma+1)}{2}\sigma_c^2-\frac{\eta(\eta+1)}{2}\sigma_z^2 + \sigma \eta \rho_{zc} \sigma _z\sigma_c\tag{2} Rt+1f​≈1+δ+σμc​+ημz​−2σ(σ+1)​σc2​−2η(η+1)​σz2​+σηρzc​σz​σc​(2)

                      EtRt+1≈Rt+1f−Cov⁡(Mt,t+1β,Rt+1){\mathbb E}_t R_{t+1}\approx R_{t+1}^f - \operatorname{Cov}\left(\frac{M_{t,t+1}}{\beta},R_{t+1}\right) Et​Rt+1​≈Rt+1f​−Cov(βMt,t+1​​,Rt+1​)

                      Mt,t+1β=(1+c^t+1)−σ(1+z^t+1)−η≈1−σc^t+1−ηz^t+1\frac{M_{t,t+1}}{\beta}= (1+\hat c_{t+1})^{-\sigma}(1+\hat z_{t+1})^{-\eta}\approx 1-\sigma \hat c_{t+1}-\eta \hat z_{t+1} βMt,t+1​​=(1+c^t+1​)−σ(1+z^t+1​)−η≈1−σc^t+1​−ηz^t+1​

                      从而获得

                      EtRt+1≈Rt+1f+σCov⁡(c^t+1,Rt+1)+ηCov⁡(z^t+1,Rt+1)=Rt+1f+σρcRσRσc+ηρzRσzσR(3)\begin{aligned}{\mathbb E}_t R_{t+1}& \approx R_{t+1}^f + \sigma \operatorname {Cov}{(\hat c_{t+1},R_{t+1})}+\eta \operatorname {Cov}{(\hat z_{t+1},R_{t+1})}\\ & = R_{t+1}^f + \sigma \rho _{cR}\sigma _R\sigma _c + \eta \rho _{zR} \sigma _z\sigma _R\end{aligned}\tag{3}Et​Rt+1​​≈Rt+1f​+σCov(c^t+1​,Rt+1​)+ηCov(z^t+1​,Rt+1​)=Rt+1f​+σρcR​σR​σc​+ηρzR​σz​σR​​(3)

                      从 (2) 和 (3) 可以看出，引入 Zt+1/ZtZ_{t+1}/Z_tZt+1​/Zt​ 有利于缓解风险溢价之谜和无风险利率之谜。

                      （5） 由第四问可知，引入新的 (Zt+1/Zt)η(Z_{t+1}/Z_t)^\eta(Zt+1​/Zt​)η 项有利于缓解风险溢价之谜与无风险利率之谜。请简述往往引入那些经济变量来获得 Zt+1/ZtZ_{t+1}/Z_tZt+1​/Zt​。

                      解：

                      在以下积累情况，均可能较基准模型引入新的变量 Zt+1/ZtZ_{t+1}/Z_tZt+1​/Zt​。

                      1. 消费习惯
                      2. 递归效用（如 Epstein-Zin）
                      3. 极端风险
                      4. 有限理性（理性疏忽或模糊优化是常见的两种）
                      5. 异质性的事前信息
                      6. 有个体差异性的劳动收入
                      7. 融资约束
                      8. 金融中介

                      # Example 6 消费习惯

                      居民效用如下

                      Et∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k,Ct+k−1)s.t.Ct+k+At+k+1=Rt+kAt+k+Wt+kNt+k \begin{align*}&{\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} \beta^k u(C_{t+k},C_{t+k-1})\\ & \text{s.t.} \quad C_{t+k}+ A_{t+k+1} = R_{t+k} A_{t+k} + W_{t+k}N_{t+k}\end{align*}​Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct+k​,Ct+k−1​)s.t.Ct+k​+At+k+1​=Rt+k​At+k​+Wt+k​Nt+k​​

                      (1) 求拉格朗日条件

                      (2) 求此时的 Mt,t+1M_{t,t+1}Mt,t+1​

                      (3) 若 u(Ct,Ct−1)=(Ct−rCt−1)1−σ/(1−σ)u(C_t,C_{t-1})= (C_t-rC_{t-1})^{1-\sigma}/(1-\sigma)u(Ct​,Ct−1​)=(Ct​−rCt−1​)1−σ/(1−σ)，问 Mt,t+1M_{t,t+1}Mt,t+1​的表达式

                      (4) 结合题 2，说明其对分析风险溢价之谜的作用

                      (5) 结合 Example 5，说明此题中的 Zt+1Z_{t+1}Zt+1​ 的表示

                      Mt,t+1=β(Ct+1Ct)−σ(1−rCtCt+1)−σ−rβEt+1(Ct+2Ct+1−r)−σ(1−rCt−1Ct)−σ−rβEt+1(Ct+1Ct−r)−σM_{t,t+1} = \beta \left( \frac{C_{t+1}}{C_t}\right)^{-\sigma}\frac{(1-r\frac{C_t}{C_{t+1}})^{-\sigma}-r\beta {\mathbb E_{t+1}}\left( \frac{C_{t+2}}{C_{t+1}}-r\right)^{-\sigma}}{(1-r\frac{C_{t-1}}{C_{t}})^{-\sigma}-r\beta {\mathbb E_{t+1}}\left( \frac{C_{t+1}}{C_{t}}-r\right)^{-\sigma}} Mt,t+1​=β(Ct​Ct+1​​)−σ(1−rCt​Ct−1​​)−σ−rβEt+1​(Ct​Ct+1​​−r)−σ(1−rCt+1​Ct​​)−σ−rβEt+1​(Ct+1​Ct+2​​−r)−σ​

                      从而有

                      Zt=(1−rCt−1Ct)−σ−rβEt+1(Ct+1Ct−r)−σZ_t = \left(1-r\frac{C_{t-1}}{C_{t}}\right)^{-\sigma}-r\beta {\mathbb E_{t+1}}\left( \frac{C_{t+1}}{C_{t}}-r\right)^{-\sigma} Zt​=(1−rCt​Ct−1​​)−σ−rβEt+1​(Ct​Ct+1​​−r)−σ

                      Zt+1=(1−rCtCt+1)−σ−rβEt+1(Ct+2Ct+1−r)−σZ_{t+1} = \left(1-r\frac{C_t}{C_{t+1}}\right)^{-\sigma}-r\beta {\mathbb E_{t+1}}\left( \frac{C_{t+2}}{C_{t+1}}-r\right)^{-\sigma} Zt+1​=(1−rCt+1​Ct​​)−σ−rβEt+1​(Ct+1​Ct+2​​−r)−σ

                      # Example 7 Stein Lemma 和应用

                      (1) 若 XXX 是一个正态分布，对于 g(x)g(x)g(x)，若 E[g(x)(x−μ)]E[g(x)(x-\mu)]E[g(x)(x−μ)] 与 Eg′(x)Eg'(x)Eg′(x) 均存在，证明 Eg(x)(x−μ)=σ2Eg′(x)Eg(x)(x-\mu)= \sigma ^2 Eg'(x)Eg(x)(x−μ)=σ2Eg′(x)。

                      (2) 对于联立正态分布 XXX 与 YYY，有 Cov⁡(g(x),Y)=Eg′(x)(⁡X,Y)\operatorname{Cov}(g(x),Y)= Eg'(x)\operatorname(X,Y)Cov(g(x),Y)=Eg′(x)(X,Y)

                      (3) 已知 EtMt,t+1Rt+1e=0{\mathbb E_t} M_{t,t+1} R_{t+1}^e =0Et​Mt,t+1​Rt+1e​=0，其中 Rt+1eR_{t+1}^eRt+1e​ 服从正态分布，而 Mt,t+1=β(Ct+1Ct)−σM_{t,t+1} = \beta \left( \frac{C_{t+1}}{C_t}\right)^{-\sigma}Mt,t+1​=β(Ct​Ct+1​​)−σ ，ln⁡Ct+1\ln C_{t+1}lnCt+1​ 服从正态分布，利用 Stein 引理，获得 Etrt+1e=σCov⁡t(c^t+1,rt+1e){\mathbb E}_t r_{t+1}^e = \sigma \operatorname{Cov}_t (\hat c_{t+1},r_{t+1}^e)Et​rt+1e​=σCovt​(c^t+1​,rt+1e​)

                      (4) 若 ln⁡Wt+1−ln⁡Wt≃Wt+1−WtWt=Rt+1−CtWt\ln W_{t+1} - \ln W_t \simeq \frac{W_{t+1}-W_t}{W_t}= R_{t+1} - \frac{C_t}{W_t}lnWt+1​−lnWt​≃Wt​Wt+1​−Wt​​=Rt+1​−Wt​Ct​​ 成立，即 ln⁡Wt+1−ln⁡Wt=Rt+1−CtWt\ln W_{t+1}-\ln W_t= R_{t+1}-\frac{C_t}{W_t}lnWt+1​−lnWt​=Rt+1​−Wt​Ct​​，此时若 Rt+1R_{t+1}Rt+1​ 服从正态，有 Ct/WtC_t/W_tCt​/Wt​ 为常数时，该情形是否适用上面讲的情形？

                      # Example 8 连续时间下的投资决策

                      max⁡π,CEt∫0+∞e−ρsCt+s1−σ1−σdss.t.dW={[rf+π(r−rf)]W−C}dt+πσRWdB\begin{align*}\max _{\pi,C}\quad & {\mathbb E}_t \int_0^{+\infty} e^{-\rho s} \frac{C_{t+s}^{1-\sigma}}{1-\sigma}ds\\ & \text{s.t.}\quad dW = \left\{ \left[r^f + \pi\left(r-r^f \right)\right] W-C\right\}dt+ \pi \sigma_RWdB \end{align*}π,Cmax​​Et​∫0+∞​e−ρs1−σCt+s1−σ​​dss.t.dW={[rf+π(r−rf)]W−C}dt+πσR​WdB​

                      # Example 9 Epstein-Zin 的连续时间版本

                      # ※ 名词解释

                      1. 风险溢价之谜
                      2. 利率期限结构和期限溢价
